description: Notification center with unread badges, list, read-state, filtering, and clearing read notifications

userStories.title: Persist notification read state
userStories.description: As a user, read/unread state persists across sessions so notifications stay consistent.
acceptanceCriteria: Store read state server-side or in persisted store

userStories.title: Show unread badge and notification list UI
userStories.description: As a user, see unread badge and open list of notifications so I can inspect messages.
acceptanceCriteria: Notification list opens and displays items
Verify in browser using playwright-cli skill

userStories.title: Mark notification read/unread
userStories.description: As a user, mark single notifications read or unread so I track what I have handled.

userStories.title: Filter notifications by read state
userStories.description: As a user, filter notifications to show All, Unread, or Read so I focus on relevant items.
acceptanceCriteria: Add filter control and apply server or client-side filter
Verify in browser using playwright-cli skill

userStories.title: Clear all read notifications
userStories.description: As a user, clear all read notifications to declutter my list.
acceptanceCriteria: Action removes read notifications from list
Verify in browser using playwright-cli skill
